SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Accident
Represents a medical accident associated with a patient.
AccidentType
List of medical accident so that the ambulance driver is aware of the purpose of the intervention.
Agent
Represents an agent moving through the graph.
AgentFactory
Factory for creating agents by type.
AgentType
Defines the available types of agents in the simulation.
ArrivalBehavior
 
AStarPathFinder
Implementation of the A* pathfinding algorithm.
CargoAgent
Agent carrying cargo whose weight reduces its movement speed.
CongestionAwarePathFinder
Pathfinder qui tient compte de la congestion des arêtes.
CreateDialogs
Contains creation dialogs used by the application.
CreateDialogs.AgentData
Data returned by the agent creation dialog.
CreateDialogs.EdgeData
Data returned by the edge creation dialog.
CreateDialogs.EditNodeData
Data returned by the node edit dialog.
CreateDialogs.NodeData
Data returned by the node creation dialog.
DijkstraPathFinder
Implementation of the PathFinder interface using Dijkstra's algorithm.
Edge
Represents a directed or undirected connection between two nodes in the graph.
EdgeType
 
FastAgent
A faster variant of the standard Agent.
Graph
Represents a graph using an adjacency list structure.
GraphController
Controller responsible for building and configuring the graph.
GraphView
 
HelpDialog
Displays a simple help window explaining how to use the simulation.
IPathFinder
Defines a pathfinding strategy capable of computing a path between two nodes.
LegendPanel
Small legend panel displayed under the stats dashboard.
Main
 
MainApp
Main JavaFX application entry point for the LifeLine GPS Emergency Simulation.
Node
Represents a node in the graph.
NodeType
 
NormalAgent
Standard agent moving at default speed (1.0).
PathFinderFactory
Factory used to create PathFinder implementations.
PathFinderType
Types of pathfinding algorithms available in the simulation.
Patient
Represents a patient involved in a medical accident displayed when clicking on an accident node.
PatientPanel
Panel displaying real-time medical information about a patient.
PriorityAgent
High-priority agent whose movement speed scales with its priority level.
SaveManager
Utility class responsible for saving and loading the simulation state using binary serialization.
SimulationBar
Bottom control bar for simulation playback.
SimulationController
Controller responsible for building and configuring the simulation engine.
SimulationEngine
Manages the execution of the simulation.
SlowAgent
Agent that moves at half the normal speed (0.5).
State
Represents the possible states of an agent.
StatsPanel
Right-side dashboard showing statistics about the selected graph element.
ToolBox
Toolbar for graph editing and agent management actions.
